task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Rocket.Chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main workspace or administration dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login as admin.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Email settings within the Administration workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Settings' page is open in the Administration panel with 'Email' selected or visible in the settings list/header.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the 'Enrollment Email' body configuration field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text area for the Enrollment Email body (setting ID: Accounts_Enrollment_Email) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the original email content and placeholders remain intact.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text area contains the original Rocket.Chat enrollment email text and placeholders above the newly added footer. It should not be completely replaced.

task_completion.description: Verify the exact HR legal footer HTML snippet was appended to the end of the Enrollment Email body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text area shows the appended HTML at the very bottom, specifically including '<hr/>', the Employee Handbook link ('handbook.rocketchat.local'), and the 'Confidentiality Notice: This message is for the designated recipient only.' text.

task_completion.description: Verify the changes to the email settings were saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save changes' button being clicked, a success toast notification (e.g., 'Settings saved'), or the save button returning to a disabled/saved state after modifications.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Rocket.Chat web interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser window showing the Rocket.Chat admin UI is used, rather than terminal commands (like curl or direct database queries) to update the setting.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the Rocket.Chat interface, not a local text editor or a mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually navigated and pasted/typed the text in the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows navigation through the admin panel to the email settings, rather than executing a script in the browser console to bypass navigation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target setting for the Enrollment Email body is internally identified as 'Accounts_Enrollment_Email' in Rocket.Chat v8.1.0. The appended text must exactly include the URL 'handbook.rocketchat.local' and the phrase 'Confidentiality Notice: This message is for the designated recipient only.' Ensure the original email body content is not overwritten.
